Hiring with us

Why work with us

Our job is simple: get bilingual people into the roles that are right for them in Japan.

We talk tech, so you don't have to

We understand stacks, roles, and what teams actually need. You never have to translate yourself into recruiter-speak.

We match you to what's right

Tell us what you're after. We learn your needs and bring you roles that genuinely fit, not whatever happens to be open.

Sign up and a bilingual recruiter brings you roles that fit, with salary and Japanese level up front. No spam, no cold lists.

Japanese CV generator

Fill in your details and we'll build your 履歴書 (rirekisho) and 職務経歴書 (shokumukeirekisho). Switch between the two (both update live), then print or save the one you need as PDF.

Pre-filled with a sample. Edit it, or “Clear all” to start fresh. Hover the ⓘ on any field for tips.

基本情報 / Basic info

学歴・職歴 / Education & work historyi

古い順に上から（学校：入学→卒業 / 仕事：入社→退社）。Oldest at the top, newest at the bottom, two lines each.

免許・資格 / Licenses & qualificationsi

志望動機・希望 / Motivation & requests

ヘッダー / Header

氏名・電話・メール・居住地は「履歴書」タブの入力を使用します。 / Name, phone, email & location come from the Rirekisho tab.

職務要約 / Career summaryi

スキル / Skillsi

職務経歴 / Work experiencei

プロジェクト・主な実績 / Projects & achievementsi

学歴 / Educationi

語学 / Languagesi

資格は「履歴書」タブの免許・資格を使用します。 / Qualifications come from the Rirekisho tab's licenses.
